description: Create a View Package under the selected Unity project at Locus/views/<view-id>. Use this only inside the /view workflow. It validates the View id, writes the template package, and returns package summary plus manifest metadata. Use normal file tools to read or edit files inside packageRoot.

id.description: Lowercase kebab-case View id, for example material-inspector.

name.description: Display name for the View. Defaults to a title generated from id.

template.description: Built-in View template to copy. Supported values: blank, inspector-form, node-graph, link-board.

icon.description: Optional Locus icon library name for the View list. Defaults by template.
